caption: A man in a white shirt speaks into multiple microphones during an outdoor press conference, surrounded by other men in formal attire. The setting includes a blurred outdoor background with greenery. On-screen graphics overlay the video, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a red banner at the bottom featuring the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: बिहार ने NDA को बहुमत दिया था" and the time "10:05 PM." A red headline at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". Throughout the sequence, the camera focuses on the speaking man, while various portrait photos of political figures, including "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," "सब्रत चौधरी," and "विजय सिन्हा," appear in side panels. As the sequence progresses, the on-screen graphics shift; the side panels update to show different people, such as "विजेंद्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार," and a portrait of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" briefly appears on the left.
